chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. S- 509 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 30.6.2014 Mr. Deedar Hussain Baloch advocate for petitioner Mr. Ashfaq Nabi Qazi A.A.G. Learned counsel for petitioner submits that the official respondents are causing harassment to the petitioner without due course of law. Learned A.A.G. present in court files comments of respondent Nos. 1, 3 and 4. In the comments the official respondents have denied to have caused any kind of harassment to the petitioner. However, they have stated that FIR No. 57 of 2014 PS Kunri under Section 324, 353, 399, 402, 120-B PPC is lodged against the petitioner which is pending trial before the competent court of law. They have undertaken that in fact that would not cause any kind of harassment to the petitioner and would act strictly in accordance with law without prejudice to the FIR. Learned counsel appearing for petitioner is satisfied with such statement made by the official respondents. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms with directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE k/-
